name_en: Burberry【Model 6641】Small Exquisite 'Title - Tiler' Handbag, crafted from vintage tartan fabric, accented with smooth leather trim and exquisite three-button rivets. Can be carried by the top handle or worn on the shoulder with a detachable strap. Size: 26 x 13.5 x 20cm
